욥기 30:1.content: “But now those who are younger than I have me in derision, whose fathers I considered unworthy to put with my sheep dogs.

욥기 30:2.content: Of what use is the strength of their hands to me, men in whom ripe age has perished?

욥기 30:3.content: They are gaunt from lack and famine. They gnaw the dry ground, in the gloom of waste and desolation.

욥기 30:4.content: They pluck salt herbs by the bushes. The roots of the broom tree are their food.

욥기 30:5.content: They are driven out from among men. They cry after them as after a thief;

욥기 30:6.content: So that they dwell in frightful valleys, and in holes of the earth and of the rocks.

욥기 30:7.content: They bray among the bushes. They are gathered together under the nettles .

욥기 30:8.content: They are children of fools, yes, children of wicked men. They were flogged out of the land.

욥기 30:9.content: “Now I have become their song. Yes, I am a byword to them.

욥기 30:10.content: They abhor me, they stand aloof from me, and don’t hesitate to spit in my face.

욥기 30:11.content: For he has untied his cord, and afflicted me; and they have thrown off restraint before me.

욥기 30:12.content: On my right hand rise the rabble. They thrust aside my feet, They cast up against me their ways of destruction.

욥기 30:13.content: They mar my path. They promote my destruction without anyone’s help.

욥기 30:14.content: As through a wide breach they come. They roll themselves in amid the ruin.

욥기 30:15.content: Terrors have turned on me. They chase my honor as the wind. My welfare has passed away as a cloud.

욥기 30:16.content: “Now my soul is poured out within me. Days of affliction have taken hold of me.

욥기 30:17.content: In the night season my bones are pierced in me, and the pains that gnaw me take no rest.

욥기 30:18.content: My garment is disfigured by great force. It binds me about as the collar of my tunic.

욥기 30:19.content: He has cast me into the mire. I have become like dust and ashes.

욥기 30:20.content: I cry to you, and you do not answer me. I stand up, and you gaze at me.

욥기 30:21.content: You have turned to be cruel to me. With the might of your hand you persecute me.

욥기 30:22.content: You lift me up to the wind, and drive me with it. You dissolve me in the storm.

욥기 30:23.content: For I know that you will bring me to death, To the house appointed for all living.

욥기 30:24.content: “However doesn’t one stretch out a hand in his fall? Or in his calamity therefore cry for help?

욥기 30:25.content: Didn’t I weep for him who was in trouble? Wasn’t my soul grieved for the needy?

욥기 30:26.content: When I looked for good, then evil came. When I waited for light, darkness came.

욥기 30:27.content: My heart is troubled, and doesn’t rest. Days of affliction have come on me.

욥기 30:28.content: I go mourning without the sun. I stand up in the assembly, and cry for help.

욥기 30:29.content: I am a brother to jackals, and a companion to ostriches.

욥기 30:30.content: My skin grows black and peels from me. My bones are burned with heat.

욥기 30:31.content: Therefore my harp has turned to mourning, and my pipe into the voice of those who weep.
